info.title: Collision Engineers Parser
info.description: Custom connector for the cedocumentmapper_v2 parser Function. POST a base64 instruction document and receive the settled 12-field EVA extraction (with per-field value/confidence/source), plus the Case-identity vrm/reference surfaced separately. PDF_MAPPER_ENABLED gating is enforced in the calling flow, not here.

post.description: Decode a SINGLE-base64 document (binary file param: type string, format byte, x-ms-media-kind File), extract the 12-field EVA payload, and return it with field-level provenance plus Case-identity vrm/reference.

200.description: Parsed result (extraction may be incomplete; see issues).

400.description: Bad input (missing/invalid document — e.g. not single base64 (bad_base64) — filename, or JSON).

422.description: The document itself is unreadable (corrupt/truncated/not a real document, or a double-encoded payload whose single decode is not a parseable document). A client problem; route the case to review, do not retry.

document.description: Base64-encoded document bytes (.pdf/.docx/.doc/.eml/.msg), SINGLE-encoded. DO NOT add `format: byte` or `x-ms-media-kind: File` to this param: this Power Platform runtime then re-encodes the base64 a SECOND time (double-encode) and the parser returns 422 document_unreadable. Verified live 2026-06-19: adding format:byte caused a burst of CS Parse 422s and broke intake; reverting to a plain string fixed it. The Power Automate flow passes `@base64ToBinary(triggerBody()?['instructionBytesB64'])` (NOT the raw base64 string) — with a plain-string param this gateway still byte-encodes the value, so base64ToBinary yields the correct single-encoding. As a belt-and-braces safeguard the parser `_decode_document` also tolerates a redundant 2nd base64 layer (logging each recovery) because this gateway re-encodes unpredictably. See memory `powerplatform-connector-base64-double-encode`.

filename.description: Original filename WITH extension (selects the parser reader).

provider_hint.description: Optional provider id or name to bias provider detection.

FieldCell.description: One EVA field value with provenance.

source.description: Extraction rule id / provenance label, or 'absent' when the parser did not supply this field.

Extraction.description: The settled 12-field EVA extraction. Keys are emitted in contract order.

vrm.description: Case-identity (correlation/dedup). NOT part of the EVA payload.

reference.description: Case-identity (correlation/dedup). NOT part of the EVA payload.

apiKeyHeader.name: x-functions-key
apiKeyHeader.description: Azure Functions host/function key, stored on the custom connection. Never embedded in this definition.

x-ms-connector-metadata.propertyValue: FUNCTION-level auth: the connector sends the function key as x-functions-key. The API gateway additionally fronts the endpoint; do not expose the Function host directly.
